events.title: Iran's Asymmetric Counterair Campaign Targets US Assets
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This marks a significant escalation in Iran's counterair campaign against U.S. regional air operations.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: US Deploys Mines in Southern Iran
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over Kafari village in southern Iran, resulting in civilian casualties. This marks a significant escalation in direct kinetic actions within Iran.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing Hit IRGC Compound and School in Minab, Iran
events.desc: Newly verified videos reveal two waves of missile strikes on an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. This attack highlights the continued kinetic pressure on Iranian military and potentially civilian infrastructure.

events.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks in Pakistan Face Uncertainty Amid Accusations
events.desc: Scheduled US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan are uncertain as both sides accuse each other of violating a fragile two-week ceasefire. Disagreements over the Strait of Hormuz and Israeli actions in Lebanon threaten to derail diplomatic efforts.

events.title: Israel Launches Major Strikes Across Lebanon Amidst Ceasefire Concerns
events.desc: Israel conducted extensive strikes across Lebanon, including Beirut's southern suburbs, southern Lebanon, and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced. This action is seen by Iran as a grave violation of the truce.

events.title: US and Iran trade accusations over ceasefire violations
events.desc: The fragile two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran is showing strain as Washington accuses Tehran of breaching promises regarding the Strait of Hormuz, while Iran asserts that Israeli attacks in Lebanon also violate the truce.

events.title: Lebanon faces food security crisis due to Iran war
events.desc: The World Food Programme has warned that Lebanon is facing a severe food security crisis due to disruptions caused by the ongoing war with Iran, further exacerbating the regional instability.

events.title: Iran Imposes Internet Blackout Amidst Adversarial Strikes
events.desc: The Iranian government deliberately dismantled communication infrastructure and halted internet traffic, causing a 98% collapse in connectivity. This blackout occurred concurrently with strikes by adversaries targeting military installations and leadership, indicating a coordinated effort to control information flow.

events.title: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks amid ongoing conflict
events.desc: Israeli and Lebanese officials are slated to meet in Washington D.C. to discuss de-escalation, pressured by U.S. President Donald Trump. However, fighting continues, threatening to undermine a fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

events.title: US VP Vance warns Iran ahead of Pakistan talks
events.desc: Vice President JD Vance departed for Pakistan to attend US-Iran peace talks, issuing a warning to Tehran not to 'play us,' while expressing optimism for positive negotiations if Iran negotiates in good faith.

events.title: India expresses deep concern over civilian casualties in Lebanon
events.desc: India's foreign ministry conveyed deep concern regarding civilian casualties in Lebanon, following a significant Israeli bombardment. This statement comes amidst the broader context of the U.S.-Israel war against Iran and its regional repercussions.

events.title: Lebanon insists on ceasefire before engaging in talks with Israel
events.desc: A senior Lebanese official stated that Lebanon will only participate in talks with Israel if a comprehensive ceasefire is first established, highlighting the critical need for de-escalation on the ground.

events.title: France to deploy strategic air forces to European allies
events.desc: French President Emmanuel Macron announced a new doctrine of 'forward deterrence,' offering to deploy French Strategic Air Forces to European countries, a significant move in nuclear posture and European security architecture.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, exposing vulnerabilities in the security protocols of ministries handling sensitive information, potentially impacting national security.

events.title: Ukraine in talks with Oman, Kuwait, and Bahrain for security cooperation
events.desc: Ukraine is actively pursuing security cooperation with Oman, Kuwait, and Bahrain, aiming to share its expertise in drone defense technology. This follows similar agreements made with Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and the UAE.
